allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); j=d[''''job'''']; print\(f''''Status: {j[""status""]}, Crawled: {j[""pages_crawled""]}, Queued: {j[""pages_queued""]}, BP: {j[""backpressure_active""]}''''\)")
